# Move a type out of a grouped type decl; sibling types remain in source.
exec sflit -source big.go -sink my_struct.go -receiver MyStruct -move
cmp my_struct.go expected_sink.go
cmp big.go expected_src.go

-- big.go --
package p

type (
	Helper struct{}
	MyStruct struct{ X int }
)

func (m MyStruct) Foo() {}
-- expected_sink.go --
package p

type MyStruct struct{ X int }

func (m MyStruct) Foo() {}
-- expected_src.go --
package p

type (
	Helper struct{}
)
